title: TypeScript, JavaScript, and the TypeScript 7 Toolchain
description: Trace a service-status module through TypeScript 7 checking, JavaScript emission, module loading, and runtime behavior. Learners cumulatively produce a compiler-to-runtime evidence notebook through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish compile-time type evidence from emitted JavaScript and runtime validation.
Predict which TypeScript constructs erase, transform, or affect emitted JavaScript and source maps.
Use the TypeScript 7 native compiler and explain when a TypeScript 6 API compatibility tool remains necessary.
